name: typeland
description: A testing environment to learn new coding practices and techniques.

scripts.build: tsc && npm run build-assignments && npm run copy-files
scripts.build-assignments: tsc pages/gallery/*.ts --outDir pages/gallery --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck
scripts.copy-files: cp index.html dist/ && cp -r pages dist/ && cp -r styles dist/ && cp src/QuizKingdom/quizStyles.css dist/QuizKingdom/
